RBAC Schema: users + roles + permissions + user_roles + role_permissions
Brand as central FK anchor for ad_accounts, whitelist_rules, ad_creative_versions, fraud_logs, alerts
Auth login flow: Handler → Service → DTO
Fraud detection flow: ad_creatives → ad_creative_versions → fraud_logs → alerts
RBAC: User-Role-Permission many2many relationship
Brand CRUD layer: Repository-Service-DTO pattern
Fraud detection: BrandWhitelistRule + FraudLog linked by BrandID and MatchedRuleID
Meta Ads Full Sync Pipeline
AdAccount CRUD Pattern (Handler-Service-Repository)
Ads CRUD Pattern (Handler-Service-Repository)
Campaign Read Flow: Handler calls Service calls Repository
Insight Sync Flow: ServiceImpl fetches from Meta API and upserts via Repository
Dashboard aggregates Campaign, AdSet and Insight data via SQL JOINs in Repository
JWT Auth + Permission Check Flow
Meta Domain Dependency Injection in RegisterApiRoutes
Sync Batch Lifecycle (Repository, Service, Route)
